response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience with strong alignment to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, and React are consistent throughout his career, and he has current hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq that directly matches the AI agent development requirement. His TDD discipline, cloud exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), and MongoDB/MySQL database experience further support the role. The main gaps are the absence of explicit NestJS experience (the primary backend framework), no evident Kotlin backend work, and unconfirmed familiarity with Vitest or Playwright specifically.
strengths: 15+ years of consistent full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple production environments
Active AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq directly satisfies the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture demonstrated through TDD practice, authored testing libraries, and led testing workshops
concerns: No mention of NestJS despite it being the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin/Java exposure is limited to robotics and tooling contexts, not server-side JVM backend services
Vitest and Playwright are not referenced; testing framework specifics for the primary stack are unconfirmed
